instruction:
$\widehat{O A}$For $\widehat{O A}$For $\widehat{O A}$for $\widehat{o a}$for each point $P \left(x, y \right)$, the area enclosed by curve arc $\widehat{O P}$and line segment $\overline{{{O P}}}$is $x^{2}$, and the equation of curve arc $\widehat{O A}$is ().

Options:
A. $$y=-4 x \operatorname{l n} y + y$$
B. $$y=-4 x \operatorname{l n} y + y-4$$
C. $$y=-4 x \operatorname{l n} x+x$$
D. $$y=-4 x \operatorname{l n} y + y+2$$
E. $$y=4x\operatorname{l n}x-3x$$
F. $$y=-4 x \operatorname{l n} y + 2xy$$
G. $$y=-4x\operatorname{l n}x+2x$$
H. $$y=-4 x \operatorname{l n} y + y+4$$
I. $$y=-4 x \operatorname{l n} y + y-2$$
J. $$y=4 x \operatorname{l n} x + x$$
